# PuForm

## Intent

- form container
- validated form

## Prefer When

- Use as the structural container for grouped fields and submit actions.

## Avoid When

- Avoid for read-only metadata; use PuDescriptionList.

## Import

```ts
import { PuForm } from '@partner-up-dev/design-web'
```

- `schema`
- `cellPadding`

## Slots

- `default`

## Events

- `submit`

- PuInput

- PuCheckbox
- PuFileUpload
- PuFilesUpload
